prompt:
Generate a full-body, front-view portrait of character protagonist based on the following description, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. Gazing straight ahead. Standing with arms relaxed at sides. Natural expression.
Features: **Full-body character design, pure white background, centered standing pose, no text, no symbols, no words.**

A strikingly handsome young man in his mid-to-late twenties, with an ethereal, melancholic beauty that feels almost dreamlike. Extremely attractive face with delicate, finely sculpted features — high cheekbones, a sharp yet elegant jawline, straight nose bridge, and deep-set dark eyes that carry a quiet, haunted intensity, as if they have witnessed things beyond the waking world. His skin is pale, luminous, and flawlessly smooth with an almost translucent quality, as though light passes faintly through him. Subtle dark circles beneath his eyes hint at accumulated exhaustion — the residue of too many dreams carried back into reality. His expression is restrained and contemplative, lips slightly parted, gaze directed just off-center with a distant, introspective stillness — not cold, but profoundly internalized.

His hair is dark black with a faint bluish undertone, medium-length, slightly tousled and layered, falling softly across his forehead and temples in an effortless, wind-touched manner — as if he just emerged from a rain-soaked dreamscape. A few strands catch the light with a muted sheen.

He has a tall, lean but powerfully built physique — broad shoulders tapering to a narrow waist, with the long limbs and coiled physicality of someone whose body is his primary instrument of perception. His posture is upright yet carries a subtle forward lean, suggesting perpetual readiness, a body always listening to vibrations others cannot feel.

He wears a dark charcoal-grey fitted long coat that falls to mid-calf, with a high mandarin-style collar left slightly open at the throat. The coat's fabric has a matte, almost smoke-like texture — soft, fluid, faintly iridescent in certain angles as if woven from the membrane between sleep and waking. Beneath the coat, a simple black crewneck sweater in fine-gauge knit, fitted close to the torso. Dark slate trousers, slim-cut, with clean lines. On his feet, matte black leather boots with thin soles — the kind designed to feel every surface beneath them. Around his left wrist, a thin band of tarnished silver — a resonance device, minimal and unadorned, the only visible piece of technology, its surface faintly etched with hairline patterns resembling neural pathways.

His hands are elegant with long, sensitive fingers — slightly tensed at his sides, fingertips subtly curled inward as if still registering the phantom texture of rain that fell only in someone else's dream. Faint, bruise-like discolorations ghost along the backs of his hands and wrists — the physical echoes of others' pain, manifested as dreamborne residue.

**Cinematic lighting, dreamcore aesthetic.** Soft diffused illumination as if filtered through layers of subconscious atmosphere. The figure radiates a quiet, magnetic presence — beautiful, burdened, and liminal, existing on the threshold between the real and the remembered. Muted color palette of deep greys, blacks, and cool undertones. Photorealistic rendering with a subtle filmic grain and gentle depth-of-field softness at the edges, evoking the visual language of contemplative cinema.

**Keywords: extremely handsome, attractive, delicate features, clear skin, cinematic style, dreamcore, full-body character design, white background, no text, no symbols, no words, male character, tall athletic build, dark mysterious aesthetic, melancholic beauty, ethereal presence.**, very handsome, very beautiful, stunning, delicate features, symmetrical face, clear skin, attractive, full body, standing pose, arms relaxed at sides, pure white background, character centered, no text, no symbols, no garbled characters, no words
Style: 电影风格，梦核气质
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.

No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.

side.prompt:

No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.
